name: OpenSlides
description: AI pitch deck generator. Point it at a prompt (and optionally a company URL) and get a branded pitch deck back as HTML slides plus a base64-encoded PDF.

generate.label: Generate Deck
generate.description: Generate a branded pitch deck from a prompt and optional company URL. Scrapes brand colors, fonts, and logo from the URL. Returns slide HTML and (when PDF export is available) a base64-encoded PDF.

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.label: Prompt
inputs.description: What the deck is about. Include company, stage, ask, and audience.
inputs.placeholder: Floom is the production layer for AI scripts. Raising $200K F&F at $8M cap.

inputs.name: company_url
inputs.label: Company URL
inputs.description: Optional company website. If set, brand colors, fonts, and logo are scraped from it.

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.description: Target audience: vc, angel, ff, or customer.

inputs.name: deck_type
inputs.label: Deck Type
inputs.description: Type of deck: pitch, sales, update, or general.

iterate.label: Iterate Slides
iterate.description: Regenerate specific slides of a previously generated deck while keeping the rest. Returns the updated deck.

inputs.name: deck_id
inputs.label: Previous Deck ID
inputs.description: ID of the deck to iterate on.

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.label: Refinement
inputs.description: What to change or improve on the selected slides.

inputs.name: slide_indices
inputs.label: Slide Indices (JSON array)
inputs.description: 0-based indices of slides to regenerate, e.g. [2, 4, 5].

resolve_logo.label: Resolve Logo
resolve_logo.description: Find the best logo URL for a company name or domain. Uses Simple Icons, svgl, and favicon fallbacks.
